title: senna mexicana var. chapmanii
intro: Senna mexicana var. chapmanii, also known as var. chapmanii, is a variety of the Senna mexicana plant, a flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a laxative due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna mexicana var. chapmanii include its ability to treat constipation, as well as its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and aid in weight loss. Senna mexicana var. chapmanii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and its dried leaves and pods are often used in traditional medicine.
